transcript: All right. How's everyone doing? Made it to the third day. So I'm Austin, co-founder of Neuko, the operating system for the next generation of entertainment. And today, I'm here to discuss how our flagship IP, G'Boy, has become the fastest growing brand in Web3 by burning the traditional playbooks of our space. So our success is rooted in an understanding that Web3 IP has been broken. Today, we will discuss the three major issues we see plaguing projects in our space. Number one is building in reverse. For years, projects have sold forward promises of being the next Disney by selling upfront to their communities. Yet, what we see time and time again is a failure to deliver any meaningful story to make people fall in love with these brands. Number two is our communities are marginalized. We aren't supporting our biggest advocates with the tooling or agency to create alongside us. Instead, the industry continually treats our holders as consumers. And number three is value accrual. How does it benefit holders has become a meme in our space and for good reason. Things that are good for business never seem to find their way back to the communities who have stood by them and supported them. We think it's time for something better. Introducing G'Boy, our flagship IP at Neuko. G'Boy is for those who have been cast aside. Those who believe the game is rigged. It's a movement where early belief and proliferation are rewarded, and mercenary extraction is punished. Where friction is filter, and participation is always the alpha. We've tackled each major pain point head on. Building story first, empowering our holders, and aligning incentives. With G'Boy, we started with the story first, foregoing the traditional mint first playbook. We created immersive lore which gamified the experience at every step. We moved quickly to identify our earliest fans and then decentralized the growth of our community through rewarding them with NFTs that served as the key to our ecosystem. Next, we empowered our holders to build alongside us. In launching gboyspecial.com, we gave the community the tools we use at Neuko to create high-quality, consistent content built on our own fine-tuned models. As a result, we've seen explosive growth as the community has created, and this is late at this point because I submitted this a few days ago, over a hundred thousand generations in the past three weeks. Catapulting us to the fastest growing meme depot in the world. And this isn't AI slop or fan fiction. The quality of the content is on par if not better than our internal pipeline. And if you don't believe me, every single image from this presentation was sourced by our community. Co-creation isn't a buzzword anymore. It's foundational to our success. And lastly, we're extremely focused on solving value accrual through aligned incentives. Our solution is powered by the G'Boy leaderboard where holders earn for creating content, collecting, and connecting on socials. The result has been an ability to direct reward contributions to our ecosystem. Further, while we've seen some iterations on tethering NFTs and fungible tokens, we believe there's more work to be done and are committed to iterating in this space. And one more thing... So with our strong foundation set, it's time to bring it to the next level. G'Boy is now live. Like now. Like literally scan the QR code, it's live right now. Welcome to the future of entertainment. Thank you.

enrichment.generated_query: G'Boy Neuko Solana Breakpoint 2025 official announcement blog technical docs

sources.title: Introducing Hermes 4.3: Local Intelligence Globally Trained
sources.snippet:
Introducing Hermes 4.3: Local Intelligence Globally Trained - NOUS RESEARCH[Skip to content](#content)
[](#elementor-action:action=popup:open&settings=eyJpZCI6IjE3NjEiLCJ0b2dnbGUiOmZhbHNlfQ==)
Menu
# Introducing Hermes 4.3: Local Intelligence Globally Trained
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/435_b_s_2-scaled.jpg)
Today we’re releasing Hermes 4.3 ([🤗 Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B)), an update to our flagship Hermes series of models. Hermes 4.3 was trained with an extended context length (up to 512K) and nearly matches (and in some cases exceeds) the performance of Hermes 4 70B at half the parameter cost. Based on[Seed-OSS-36B-Base](https://huggingface.co/ByteDance-Seed/Seed-OSS-36B-Base), Hermes 4.3 is an excellent shape for consumer local inference or enterprise self-deployment. The[GGUFs](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B-GGUF)comfortably sit in the VRAM of off-the-shelf GPUs, offering a private, powerful, neutrally-aligned model to everyone.
Hermes 4.3 is our first production model post-trained entirely on the[Psyche](https://psyche.network/)network, our distributed training network that uses the DisTrO optimizer to efficiently communicate between training nodes spread out through data centers over the open internet and secured by the consensus of the Solana blockchain. By enabling nodes throughout the world to collaborate on a single training run, Psyche can dramatically reduce the cost of training frontier level models, leveling the playing field for open source AI model developers.
Although we’ve performed extensive scientific research on DisTrO and its implementation in Psyche, we decided to verify its effectiveness for production workloads by training Hermes 4.3 both on Psyche and via the traditional centralized approach. As outlined in the[Hermes 4 Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2508.18255), we used our[custom version of Torchitan](https://github.com/nousresearch/torchtitan/)to train Hermes 4.3 following the same recipe as Hermes 4 (FSDP+AdamW). We then trained the model a second time on Psyche (TP+DisTrO). Given the extended context length and increased training set size, the Hermes 4.3 training run was twice as large as Hermes 4.
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_12-scaled.png)
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_22-scaled.png)
The training run proved stable throughout, averaging 144k tokens/second spread across 24 Psyche nodes. Using DisTro’s overlapped collective strategy, the entirety of the P2P communications were hidden by the training time, effectively achieving equivalent throughput to traditional, centralized training. Under the hood, Psyche uses a dual L1-P2P networking model where consensus state is managed by a smart contract on the Solana blockchain while training gradients are communicated out-of-band through a custom mesh P2P network.
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_34_2-scaled.png)
**The Psyche trained version of Hermes 4.3 outperformed the traditional centralized version on a suite of downstream tasks**. Although previous runs had produced similar results, it was a confirming signal that Psyche is up to the task of training production models. Hermes 4.3 achieves SOTA on RefusalBench across all popular closed and open models in being helpful and aligned to the user’s values. For transparency we are publishing the full set of[evaluation responses and scorings](https://huggingface.co/datasets/NousResearch/eval-Hermes-4.3-36B). In addition we are releasing the centrally trained version ([🤗 Model](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B-centralized),[Evals](https://huggingface.co/datasets/NousResearch/eval-Hermes-4.3-36B-centralized)) as a research artifact (you’re welcome @xl8harder).
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_52-scaled.png)
To learn more about Psyche, check out the[live dashboard](https://psyche.network/)

sources.title: Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
sources.snippet:
Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f0866da8eed4c/6867a1f64ca2c75f0d14f371_16c97ce9017b907297827c5113a068f9_Frame%201597880158.avif)](https://www.drift.trade/)

Launch App

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

sources.title: Infrastructure Breakthrough as Bitcoin Munari Completes First Solana-to-Mainnet Integration Framework
sources.snippet:
[Accessibility: Skip TopNav](https://www.globenewswire.com/www.globenewswire.com#maincontainer)

# Infrastructure Breakthrough as Bitcoin Munari Completes First Solana-to-Mainnet Integration Framework

November 20, 2025 12:00 ET\| Source:
[Bitcoin Munari](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/Bitcoin%2520Munari)Bitcoin Munari

_Bitcoin Munari’s public presale is underway at the initial price of $0.35 as the project details the first iteration of its Solana-to-Mainnet integration framework, marking a key milestone in its multi-phase technical roadmap._

HELSINKI, Finland, Nov. 20, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bitcoin Munari is progressing through its public presale at the initial $0.01 round, part of a ten-stage distribution cycle that runs through the project’s January 20, 2026 SPL token release. The presale phase coincides with the completion of the project’s first Solana-to-Mainnet integration framework, establishing the structural foundation for its transition to an independent Layer-1 blockchain in 2027.

**Solana Integration Framework Establishes Transition Structure**

Bitcoin Munari’s initial deployment on Solana provides an execution environment for early operations, liquidity access, and user onboarding. The newly completed integration framework outlines the technical path connecting this phase to the upcoming mainnet, including migration logic, validator-side tools, and token-mapping systems.

The broader roadmap aligns with the MUNARI principles — Modern, Unified, Network, Autonomous, Resilient, Infrastructure — which define the project’s long-term architectural direction.

**Presale Progress Anchored in Fixed-Supply Distribution**

The ongoing presale distributes 53% of the total supply across ten fixed-price rounds ranging from $0.1 to $3.00. All allocations release simultaneously on January 20, 2026, when the SPL token goes live on Solana.

A capped supply of 21 million BTCM underpins the model, ensuring that each round follows the predetermined pricing schedule and that distribution remains limited, transparent, and consistent throughout the presale period.

**Roadmap Advances Toward 2026 Public Testnet**

Development continues toward a public testnet planned for 2026, which will include validator onboarding, stress testing, and evaluation of the migration bridge between Solana and the mainnet. Testnet participants will have access to validator software, performance tools, and cross-chain migration functions.

_“The integration framework gives us a defined pathway from the Solana phase to the Layer-1 deployment,” a Bitcoin Munari spokesperson said. “Each stage is structured to ensure continuity between the initial token operations and the independent blockchain that follows.”_

**Structural Model Defines Transition Between Networks**

Bitcoin Munari’s architecture adopts a staged sequence rather than a single-chain launch. Initial token operations, distribution processes, and early liquidity take place on Solana, while governance, consensus, and execution shift to the dedicated Layer-1 network in 2027.

The migration mechanism uses a 1:1 conversion model, allowing SPL tokens to be exchanged for native BTCM once the mainnet becomes available. The separation of phases enables each component to mature independently before forming the unified system.

**Development Oversight Enhanced Through Independent Reviews**

Technical components associated with the Solana deployment have undergone external evaluation. Third-party assessments include the [Solidproof](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=BtW4puRN3DMONP7kHHuMyBPVCGzn7YL9GWFzHoybHhMc_yqFuCSyyPrWgTJYTulKGvjRpcPPWTJYC5m1DoK8BqGm0KgFQsmyDiJLITw9b4IVhbbqIRF8p1MnyNi4T6VC) smart contract audit, the [Spy Wolf](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=6i31MkC_vRgN39c-c0oWXd-xM6gRBfZQkewoLsmvGr3LU3oR3LZHP_x9bAsaTkNzB-jWlAR1EhH8yA58uq0B03x9iTApq9QvuROx-W-5XrHW8L7NOBiGVZ-lrWOHwtjfa_dBRcaRXwhyG1LG-Pj6EAHeuOkiw-LTe9S90o7Ifz4=) audit, and the [Spy Wolf KYC ve

The background is a deep, shadowy workshop with server racks and cables receding into the darkness, pierced by volumetric light beams.

From the top of the towering structure, a vibrant, multi-layered holographic lattice extrudes upwards, vividly representing the new, decentralized IP with bright, high-contrast cyan and magenta vector lines and data streams. Dramatic, cool shop lights and powerful volumetric light beams pierce through the atmospheric haze, highlighting dust motes and creating long, dramatic shadows that emphasize the engine's epic scale and height. The composition is vertical (3:4 aspect ratio), with significant negative space above the engine, making it feel truly monumental. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic lighting, product photography, high contrast.

editorial.headline: Neuko Unveils "G'Boy" at Breakpoint: AI-Native IP Protocol on Solana
editorial.standfirst: Neuko flips the traditional NFT model by deploying enterprise AI tools for community co-creation before monetization. The launch of the G'Boy protocol signals a shift from passive speculation to active, decentralized IP proliferation.
key_takeaways: 100,000+ Assets Generated: Community used Neuko's fine-tuned models to create high-fidelity content in <3 weeks via gboyspecial.com.
Live Token Launch: G'Boy (GBOY) SPL token and protocol are live on Solana Mainnet immediately following the keynote.
Value Accrual Engine: New leaderboard mechanism rewards holders for social proliferation, replacing passive staking with active contribution.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
At **Solana Breakpoint 2025**, **Neuko** co-founder **Austin Hurwitz** delivered a sharp critique of the current state of Web3 intellectual property, arguing that the industry's "mint-first, build-later" playbook has fundamentally failed. Hurwitz positioned **Neuko** not merely as a content studio, but as an "operating system for entertainment," designed to solve the misalignment between project founders and holders. The core thesis is that traditional IP models extract liquidity from communities without providing the agency or tools required to actually grow the brand value.

The solution presented is **G'Boy**, a flagship IP that inverts this dynamic through what Hurwitz calls "decentralized co-creation." Rather than selling a roadmap, **Neuko** released **gboyspecial.com**, a platform granting retail holders access to the same fine-tuned AI models used by the internal team. The results have been significant: over 100,000 community-generated assets were created in the three weeks leading up to the conference. This volume of high-fidelity output validates the demand for tools that elevate user-generated content beyond "fan fiction" or "AI slop" into canon-ready material.

Crucially, **Neuko** is attempting to solve the "value accrual" meme that plagues NFT communities. The protocol introduces the **G'Boy Leaderboard**, a mechanism that operationalizes social engagement. Instead of passive yield for staking, the system rewards users for active proliferation—creating content, collecting assets, and driving social reach. This model tethers the **GBOY** token and ecosystem directly to "proof of contribution," aiming to align the financial incentives of the protocol with the viral growth of the IP.

For institutional investors and developers on **Solana**, this launch represents a maturation of the consumer application layer. **Neuko** is effectively testing whether a "memetic protocol"—backed by enterprise-grade generation tools—can outperform the traditional studio model. By lowering the barrier to entry for high-quality content creation, **G'Boy** attempts to scale IP generation horizontally across thousands of users, a strategy that could redefine how entertainment franchises are built and monetized on-chain.
